checks.name: Help screen renders without args
checks.what: Shows 'Solar Dev Pipeline v4 (FastAPI edition)' usage block, exits 1

checks.name: History mode works on empty repo
checks.what: Either prints 'No history yet.' or lists previous tasks. Exits 0.

checks.name: Dry-run on a real archive (no writes)
checks.what: Shows audit + per-file diff, never writes to disk. Skips build & git.

checks.name: Health probe calls make health, not curl
checks.what: Returns at least one match — confirms FastAPI-native health probe.

checks.name: Build step calls make rebuild, not pnpm
checks.what: Returns one match — confirms Python/Docker build path.

checks.name: PORT default is 8000
checks.what: Returns one match — confirms FastAPI port default.
